questions.title: 编程题2：自动构建和测试
questions.template:
steps:
  - uses: actions/checkout@v4
  - name: Set up JDK
    uses: actions/setup-java@v4
    with:
      java-version: '17'
  # TODO: 添加构建命令

questions.title: 编程题7：缓存依赖加速构建
questions.template:
steps:

    uses: actions/cache@v4
    with:

        ~/.gradle/caches
